mapper.sql: d.id, d.user_id, d.department_id, d.doctor_name, d.title, d.gender, d.specialty, d.introduction, d.avatar, d.consultation_fee, d.status, d.visit_count, d.create_time, d.update_time, dp.name as department_name, u.username, u.phone, u.email, u.nickname
mapper.select:
select from doctor_info d left join sys_user u on d.user_id = u.id left join department_info dp on d.department_id = dp.id where d.status = 1
and d.department_id = #{departmentId}
and (d.doctor_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or d.specialty like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or dp.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by d.visit_count desc, d.id desc
select from doctor_info d left join sys_user u on d.user_id = u.id left join department_info dp on d.department_id = dp.id where d.status = 1 order by d.id desc
select from doctor_info d left join sys_user u on d.user_id = u.id left join department_info dp on d.department_id = dp.id where d.id = #{id}
select from doctor_info d left join sys_user u on d.user_id = u.id left join department_info dp on d.department_id = dp.id where d.user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into doctor_info(user_id, department_id, doctor_name, title, gender, specialty, introduction, avatar, consultation_fee, status, visit_count, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{departmentId}, #{doctorName}, #{title}, #{gender}, #{specialty}, #{introduction}, #{avatar}, #{consultationFee}, #{status}, #{visitCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select d.doctor_name as name, dp.name as departmentName, count(a.id) as appointmentCount from doctor_info d left join department_info dp on d.department_id = dp.id left join appointment_record a on d.id = a.doctor_id and a.status in (1, 3) where d.status = 1 group by d.id, d.doctor_name, dp.name order by appointmentCount desc, d.id desc limit 8
